purpose: Decide whether the corrected QM5_12539 London-killzone mechanism merits a separate EA implementation; this is not pipeline, qualification, FTMO, or live evidence.

chronology_repairs: Freeze every daily pool before London instead of recomputing pools from later closes.
Latch the first sweep and its then-confirmed MSS pivot; do not retrospectively replace either.
Count only post-sweep bars 1 through 8 for MSS; historical bar 1 exclusion/bar 9 inclusion is forbidden.
Require all three FVG bars after the latched MSS and select the earliest chronological FVG.
Use a restart-replayable virtual limit; server-side pending orders and RAM-only daily/partial state are outside this candidate.
Risk and flat management always precede news and entry gates.

market_data.future_outcome_fence: Stream in ascending timestamp order and stop before parsing the first row at or after 2023-01-01; never hash or inspect the later tail.
market_data.time_basis: Naive CSV timestamps are broker NY-close time. Broker time equals America/New_York civil time plus seven hours year-round.

m15_aggregation.rule: One M15 bar consists only of M5 opens q, q+5m, q+10m where q.minute mod 15 is zero.
m15_aggregation.ohlc: open=first open; high=max highs; low=min lows; close=last close; volume fields=sum.
m15_aggregation.causality: The aggregate becomes visible only at q+15m. Missing, duplicate, non-monotone, or off-grid M5 rows invalidate that M15 bar; no forward fill.

market_data.selected_slice_identity: Hash canonical parsed M5 rows strictly inside the allowed range separately per symbol; do not compute a whole-file hash.

calendar.timestamp_column: datetime interpreted as UTC, converted to America/New_York and then plus seven hours
calendar.blackout: Closed interval from 30 minutes before through 30 minutes after each relevant event.
calendar.fail_closed: Missing, malformed, duplicate-conflicting, or uncovered calendar evidence invalidates the run. FVG arm and limit touch must both pass. A touched M15 bar overlapping any blackout voids the consumed setup rather than deferring its fill.

broker_sessions.ny_equivalents: Asia is previous-NY-date [18:00,02:00); London is [02:00,05:00); hard flat is 10:00.

mechanism.day_key: Broker calendar date containing the London session.

daily_reference.completeness: Require all 32 Asia M15 bars and the 08:45 close; otherwise the day is ASIA_INCOMPLETE.
daily_reference.pdh_pdl: High and low across all valid M15 bars of the most recent earlier broker date containing data; Monday therefore uses Friday when no intervening broker date exists.
daily_reference.pivot_definition: Strict three-bar pivot: center.high > both adjacent highs or center.low < both adjacent lows. Ties are not pivots.
daily_reference.pivot_window: At 09:00 scan centers among the 96 immediately preceding valid M15 bars, accepting only pivots whose right-neighbour close is no later than 09:00.
daily_reference.pivot_extremes: Use only the lowest confirmed pivot low and highest confirmed pivot high from that window, matching the approved card's literal extreme-pivot wording.
daily_reference.freeze: At 09:00 freeze Asia high/low, PDH/PDL, pivot extremes, and the 08:45 close. No later bar may change them.
daily_reference.pool_choice: Against the frozen 08:45 close choose the nearest strictly lower price from {Asia low, PDL, lowest pivot low} and nearest strictly higher price from {Asia high, PDH, highest pivot high}. Equal-price duplicates collapse with priority ASIA, PD, PIVOT; distance ties use that priority. If either side has no eligible pool, the day is POOL_INCOMPLETE.

sweep.scan: Evaluate fully closed London bars chronologically by bar open from 09:00 through 11:45.
sweep.long: low < frozen downside pool and close > that pool
sweep.short: high > frozen upside pool and close < that pool
sweep.strictness: Touch/equality is not a sweep or reclaim.
sweep.consumption: The first qualifying sweep/reclaim consumes the day even if every later gate fails. A bar qualifying in both directions consumes the day as DUAL_SWEEP_VOID; no directional precedence.

mss.reference: At sweep close latch the most recent confirmed reversal-direction pivot: pivot high for long, pivot low for short. Its center must be strictly earlier than the sweep bar; the sweep bar may be its right confirmation neighbour.
mss.window: Sweep bar is index 0. Only the next eight fully closed M15 bars, indices 1..8 inclusive, and only closes no later than 12:00 are eligible.
mss.confirmation: First close strictly above the latched pivot for long or strictly below it for short. Equality fails. Sweep and MSS can never share a bar. The pivot and MSS event are immutable.

fvg.chronology: After MSS, inspect new closed bars in chronological order. All constituent bars A, B, C must open at or after the MSS close; the event exists only at C close.
fvg.strictness: Gap equality fails. B has no extra body rule; the FVG is the sole mechanical displacement evidence.
fvg.choice: Latch the earliest FVG only. There is no unstated FVG-bar-count limit, but C must close before 12:00. A later FVG cannot replace a void earliest FVG.

risk_and_order.atr: At FVG C close freeze SMA of True Range over the 14 most recent fully closed M15 bars including C; TR=max(high-low,abs(high-prev_close),abs(low-prev_close)).
risk_and_order.entry: FVG midpoint. Long requires C.close > midpoint; short requires C.close < midpoint, otherwise EARLIEST_FVG_NOT_LIMIT_VOID.
risk_and_order.stop: Long sweep extreme minus 0.3 ATR; short sweep extreme plus 0.3 ATR.
risk_and_order.risk_gate: Entry-to-stop distance must be positive and <=2.5 ATR; equality is allowed.
risk_and_order.opposite_target: Long chooses the nearest frozen target strictly above entry from {Asia high, PDH}; short chooses the nearest strictly below entry from {Asia low, PDL}. No pivot target and no fallback target. Missing/behind-entry target voids the setup.
risk_and_order.tp1: Fifty percent exits at the nearer of the opposite target and 2.0R.
risk_and_order.runner: Remaining fifty percent exits at 3.0R, original stop, or hard flat; stop never moves.
risk_and_order.immutability: ATR, entry, stop, R, TP1, TP3, arm time, and deadline never change after arm.
risk_and_order.virtual_limit: Arm after C close. It is eligible only on the next eight M15 bars and strictly before 12:00. Long touch is low <= entry; short touch is high >= entry. Expiry/session cutoff wins over a simultaneous touch. First touch consumes before fill handling. No fill on the FVG-defining bar.
risk_and_order.daily_cap: At most one consumed sweep, one arm attempt, and one fill per symbol/day. No later setup is substituted after any failure or expiry.

management.hard_flat: Cancel virtual orders at 12:00. Close any position at the 17:00 M15 open before evaluating profit actions. Daily flat also guarantees Friday/weekend flat; Friday London entries are otherwise allowed.
priority: stop before TP1 or TP3 when a bar contains both
on the fill bar, a touched stop realizes -1R and no same-bar favorable target is credited
on a fill bar without stop, favorable target touches are ignored until the next bar
after TP1, original stop precedes TP3 if both occur in one later bar
management.missing_17_open: Use the last valid close strictly before 17:00 and label the trade DATA_FORCED_FLAT; if none exists, invalidate that trade and the run.
management.persistence_requirement_for_future_ea: Atomically persist/replay pools, sweep, MSS pivot/event, FVG, ATR/order geometry, deadlines, touch consumption, daily fill, tickets, initial volume, TP1 and partial state. Replay never sends orders and preserves original event times. Unknown open-trade state fails closed. Risk/flat management cannot be blocked by news or entry gates.

offline_execution_proxy.price_series: CSV OHLC is treated as one executable price series. Bid/ask spread and slippage cannot be recovered and are not invented; results are mechanism proxies, not venue PnL.
offline_execution_proxy.gross_r: Normalize all partial and final price PnL by the immutable initial R.
offline_execution_proxy.external_commission: For each entry/exit deal side, USD cost=max(2.5*deal_volume*deal_price, 2.5*deal_volume), rounded to USD cents half-up; partial exits are costed separately.
offline_execution_proxy.cost_adjusted_r: gross_r minus summed external commission divided by 1000.
unmodelled: swap (structurally absent because every position is intraday)

identity: per-symbol selected M5 slice SHA256 and row/time bounds
required_report.funnel: Report every terminal state from input/day completeness through pools, sweep side/dual void, MSS, FVG, geometry/news/expiry, fill and exit reason.
required_report.performance: Report fills, gross and commission-adjusted R/net/PF/expectancy/win rate by symbol, combined, year and side.
required_report.robustness: Report top-one/top-two winner share, leave-best-out adjusted R, chronological maximum peak-to-trough adjusted-R drawdown, and every same-bar conservative-ordering count.
required_report.years: 2017 is explicitly partial and excluded from full-year stability counts; full years are 2018..2022.

ea_implementation_merit_gate.decision: MERIT only if every condition passes; otherwise NO_MERIT. This gate authorizes neither EA build nor pipeline execution.
